raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The left side of box_1 is accessible and there is enough clearance for the left end-effector to apply gentle lateral bracing without contacting box_2 or the cup.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is laterally braced by the left end-effector, reducing the risk of sliding/tilting during the grasp attempt."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is stabilized by the left arm; the front and left regions around box_1 are clear for the right end-effector to form a firm side pinch/brace grasp. The robot must avoid the blocked right side (adjacent to box_2).",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held under control by the right end-effector (via a lateral brace/pinch without using the claw) and no longer relies on table support."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The left side of box_1 is accessible and there is enough clearance for the left end-effector to apply gentle lateral bracing without contacting box_2 or the cup.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is laterally braced by the left end-effector, reducing the risk of sliding/tilting during the grasp attempt.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is stabilized by the left arm; the front and left regions around box_1 are clear for the right end-effector to form a firm side pinch/brace grasp. The robot must avoid the blocked right side (adjacent to box_2).
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held under control by the right end-effector (via a lateral brace/pinch without using the claw) and no longer relies on table support.
